Caption: Outline and analysis of the particle growth during the semi-batch Ni1/3Mn1/3Co1/3(OH)2 precipitation operation. (a) The progression of reaction operation; (b) The schematic of particle growth.
Schematic of tank layout for Ni1/3Mn1/3Co1/3(OH)2 semi-batch reaction crystallization experiments.
Experimental conditions and results for the precipitation of Ni1/3Mn1/3Co1/3(OH)2. (a) Experimental conditions; (b) Experimental results for the final size of secondary aggregates with P v.

Comparison of the distribution of the precipitation reaction ratio calculated by CFD and the shape of Ni1/3Mn1/3Co1/3(OH)2 precipitation traces on the walls observed in experiment. (a) Photograph of the Ni1/3Mn1/3Co1/3(OH)2 precipitation traces on the bottom of the crystallizer observed in the experiment in Case A; (b) The isosurface of the ratio of the precipitation reaction for CFD results varying α1 in Case A.
Schematic of particle growth by secondary agglomeration in the supersaturated region.
Parity plots of the ratio of the size of secondary aggregate at the end of the agglomeration stage.
